data.name: End
data.value: Great job! You've completed your Pomodoro session! I'm so proud of you for staying focused. Keep up the amazing work. See you next session! (◕‿◕) ❤️

data.name: Interruption
data.value: Sorry you had to take a break. See you next time!

data.name: SetHelp
data.value:
Usage: set <parameter> <value>
Modify Pomodoro timer settings.
Parameters: work Set work session duration (minutes) short Set short break duration (minutes) long Set long break duration (minutes) cycles Set total number of work sessions (Pomodoros) to complete long-every Set number of work sessions before a long break
Examples: set work 25 # 25-minute work sessions set short 5 # 5-minute short breaks set long 15 # 15-minute long breaks set cycles 12 # complete 12 Pomodoros in total set long-every 4 # take a long break after every 4 Pomodoros
All values must be positive integers. Changes take effect immediately.

data.name: WorkingDurationSetError
data.value: Incorrect duration of the working phase. Acceptable values are from 1 to 60 minutes.

data.name: Start
data.value: Hey there! Welcome to your cozy Pomodoro timer! I'm here to help you stay focused and take sweet breaks. Ready to dive in? Let's make today productive and fun! (ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*:･ﾟ✧

data.name: CurrentValue
data.value: Current value:

data.name: CommandHandleError
data.value: Unknown command. Use "help" to get valid command list.

data.name: SuccessfullySet
data.value: The value was successfully set.

data.name: RestingDurationSetError
data.value: Incorrect duration of the rest phase. Acceptable values are from 1 to 15 minutes.

data.name: GetHelp
data.value:
Usage: get [parameter]
Display current Pomodoro timer settings.
Parameters: work Show current work session duration (minutes) short Show current short break duration (minutes) long Show current long break duration (minutes) cycles Show total number of work sessions (Pomodoros) to complete long-every Show number of work sessions before a long break
If no parameter is specified, all settings are displayed.
Examples: get work # show work session duration get short # show short break duration get long # show long break duration get cycles # show total Pomodoros to complete get long-every # show long break interval get # show all settings
All values are positive integers. Use `set` to change them.

data.name: CurrentWorkingDuration
data.value: Current working phase duration:

data.name: CurrentRestingDuration
data.value: Current resting duration:

data.name: CurrentLongRestingDuration
data.value: Current long resting duration:

data.name: LongRestingDurationSetError
data.value: The long break value is incorrect. Acceptable values are from 5 to 30 minutes.

data.name: CurrentCycles
data.value: Current total cycles:

data.name: CurrentLongEvery
data.value: Current long resing rare:

data.name: LongEverySetError
data.value: Invalid sets value before a long break. Acceptable values are from 1 to 10.

data.name: CyclesSetError
data.value: Incorrect number of sets. Acceptable values are from 1 to 99.

data.name: LongRestSettingsError
data.value: The long break values are not fully set. A long break will be ignored.

data.name: Help
data.value:
Usage: <command> [arguments]
Commands: start Start the Pomodoro timer (begins a work session) quit Exit the application set Modify timer settings (see `set` help for details) get Display current settings (see `get` help for details)
For help with a specific command, type: help <command> (e.g., help set)
Examples: start # start the timer set work 25 # set work duration to 25 minutes get # show all settings quit # exit the program

data.name: NoValue
data.value: The value is not set.

data.name: ConfigNotFoundError
data.value: Configuration file not found. A default configuration will be used.

data.name: ConfigReadingError
data.value: Error reading configuration file:

data.name: ConfigInvalidJsonError
data.value: Invalid JSON format:

data.name: ConfigInvalidDataError
data.value: Configuration file is empty or contains invalid data.

data.name: ConfigSaveError
data.value: Error saving configuration:
